LabelRpdbDescription: Rating Poster Database is a service that adds posters with ratings (IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic, etc) to Emby libraries, it supports many rating types, textless posters, posters translated in many languages, adding badges (4k, HDR, DoVi, etc) and more.
LabelRpdbApiKeyHelp: The RPDB plugin requires an API Key to work, you can get one from ratingposterdb.com
LabelInvalidApiKey: This RPDB API Key is not valid
